event: Cubist still life with newspaper, bottle, and tobacco
description: A cubist collage and drawing composition featuring overlapping fragments of brown paper, newspaper clippings, and textured materials arranged on a white background with pencil-drawn geometric forms. Text fragments including partial words are visible on the pasted paper elements. The overall palette is muted browns, tans, and grays. A circular or oval form is lightly drawn in pencil around the central arrangement. The signature 'G. Braque' appears in the lower right.
